title: coleus erythraeae
intro: Coleus erythraeae, also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus panchganiensis, is a type of herbaceous perennial plant native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coleus erythraeae include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Coleus erythraeae typically involve extracting its essential oils or leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
